title: Exclude specific users from viewing a board
excerpt:
I know that Monday.com CRM allows you to set permissions so that only certain people can view a board. But I’m wondering if there’s an easier way to restrict access for just one specific user. 
For example, I have a team…

posts.author: Rabbie (Rabbie Jawahir)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know that Monday.com CRM allows you to set permissions so that only certain people can view a board. But I’m wondering if there’s an easier way to restrict access for just one specific user.

For example, I have a team of 30 users who usually all have access to the same boards. But in this case, I want to prevent only one person from seeing a particular board.

Do I have to manually list the other 29 users in the board’s permissions to make sure that one person can’t see it? Or is there a simpler way to block a single user from viewing the board while keeping access open for everyone else?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You’ll need to change the setting to the board to make the board private and then invite the others. You can either invite individually OR you can make a team with the others and then just add the team

posts.author: Rabbie (Rabbie Jawahir)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah, this is what I mentioned in my initial post but I’m looking for a way to just exclude one person from viewing the board as opposed to setting it private and then having to add every single user minus the one I want to exclude.

It just seems counter intuitive to have to add every user as opposed to just listing the one user I want to exclude.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately there’s no way to do that currently. Maybe put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
